title: Section 7
content: 1[7. Prohibition to transfer foreign contribution to other person.--No person who-- (a) is registered and granted a certificate or has obtained prior permission under this Act; and (b) receives any foreign contribution, shall transfer such foreign contribution to any other person.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 33 of 2020, s. 3, for section 7 (w.e.f. 29-9-2020).
